DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT RANDAL W. ROWLAND, DMD, MS MOTION TO SET WITNESS DEPOSITION FEE, AS TO NON-RETAINED EXPERT WITNESS, KIRK PASQUINELLI, D.D.S. IS GRANTED. THE MOTION IS UNOPPOSED BOTH BY THE PLAINTIFF AND THE EXPERT WHO WAS SERVED WITH A COPY OF THE MOTION. PURSUANT TO CRITERIA STATED IN C.C.P. 2034.470 AND SUPPORTING EVIDENCE THE APPROPRIATE DEPOSITION FEE IS $600.00 PER HOUR. THE LOCATION OF THE DEPOSITION SHALL EITHER BE THE EXPERT'S OFFICE OR OTHER LOCATION AS THE PARTIES AND EXPERT AGREE. THE START TIME OF THE DEPOSITION SHALL BE DETERMINED BY THE EXPERT CONSISTENT WITH THE NEEDS OF HIS PRACTICE. THE MOVING/PREVAILING PARTY SHALL SUBMIT A [PROPOSED] WRITTEN ORDER THAT TRACKS THE COURT'S RULING, VERBATIM. THE PROPOSED ORDER MAY BE SUBMITTED DIRECTLY TO JUDGE PRO TEM STEVEN B. STEIN, VIA EMAIL AND IN WORD (.DOC) FORMAT TO: SBS@SBSLAWSF.COM. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN B. STEIN: J. RIOS MERIDA; NOT REPORTED. (DISC302)

Defendant Randal W. Rowland, Dmd, Ms Motion To Set Witness Deposition Fee
Off Calendar Oct-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

Defendant Randal W. Rowland, Dmd, Ms Motion To Set Witness Deposition Fee, as to non-retained expert witness, Kirk Pasquinelli, D.D.S. is GRANTED. The motion is unopposed both by the plaintiff and the expert who was served with a copy of the motion. Pursuant to criteria stated in C.C.P. 2034.470 and supporting evidence the appropriate deposition fee is $600.00 per hour. The location of the deposition shall either be the expert's office or other location as the parties and expert agree. The start time of the deposition shall be determined by the expert consistent with the needs of his practice. The moving/prevailing party shall submit a [proposed] written order that tracks the Court's ruling, verbatim. The proposed order may be submitted directly to Judge Pro Tem Steven B. Stein, via email and in Word (.doc) format to: sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven B. Stein: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (DISC302)

Notice Of Motion To Set Witness Deposition Fee
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

DEFENDANT RANDAL W. ROWLAND, DMD, MS Motion To Set Witness Deposition Fee is Continued to 10/31/17 at 9:00 AM in Department 302/Discovery. The parties shall immediately provide a courtesy copy of their filings to Dept. 301 with a cover letter that reflects the new hearing date, alternatively the courtesy copies may be submitted via email directly to judge pro tem Steven Stein at sbs@sbslawsf.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Paul A. Renne; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Not Reported. (Disc302)
